data.title: Add markdown rendering for AI responses
data.description:
**Labels:** `enhancement`, `frontend`, `ui/ux`

**Description:**
AI responses often include markdown formatting (code blocks, lists, bold, etc.) that currently displays as plain text.

**Proposed Solution:**
Integrate a markdown renderer (marked.js or markdown-it) to properly display formatted responses.

**Features:**

* Render markdown syntax (headers, lists, bold, italic, links)
* Syntax highlighting for code blocks (highlight.js or Prism)
* Support for tables
* LaTeX math rendering (optional, KaTeX)

**Acceptance Criteria:**

- [ ] Markdown syntax renders correctly
- [ ] Code blocks have syntax highlighting
- [ ] Copy button for code blocks
- [ ] Security: Sanitize HTML to prevent XSS
- [ ] Responsive rendering on mobile

**Technical Considerations:**

* Add markdown parser library (minimal bundle size)
* Add syntax highlighting library
* Sanitize output to prevent XSS attacks
* Add CSS for code block styling

**Effort & Value Ranking:**

* ⏱️ Time: **Low-Medium** (library integration, styling, security sanitization)
* 🧩 Complexity: **Low-Medium** (mostly frontend work, critical XSS prevention needed)
* 💎 Value: **Very High** (essential for good UX, AI responses without markdown are poor experience)
